title: FLUX.1 Fill Inpainting
short_description: Run FLUX.1 Fill [dev] inpainting on RunPod Serverless.
description: Inpaint images with FLUX.1 Fill [dev] (Black Forest Labs). Sends an image (plus optional mask) and a prompt to a ComfyUI workflow and returns the generated image as base64. Designed to be chained with the Wan_Animate_Runpod_hub endpoint.
